caption: A man with short, styled graying hair and a trimmed beard is positioned in a recording studio, wearing black headphones and a dark long-sleeved shirt over a gray undershirt. He sits before a professional condenser microphone mounted on a shock mount and boom arm. The background consists of dark gray, vertically ribbed acoustic foam panels arranged in a grid. As the sequence progresses, the man looks slightly to his left, then shifts his gaze forward with a widened, surprised expression. His facial muscles tense, and his eyebrows lift as he reacts to something off-camera. By the final frames, his expression softens slightly as he continues to look toward the side, maintaining his position in front of the microphone throughout the short clip. No text or logos are visible in the scene.
